description: A guest bought a ticket from a third-party resale site and wants to verify if it's authentic before the event.

nodes.task_description: Explain that the venue cannot guarantee the authenticity of tickets bought from unofficial resellers.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the venue's policy and the risks of using resale sites.

nodes.task_description: Offer to look up the ticket's barcode in the system as a courtesy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent agrees to check the barcode.

nodes.task_description: Check the barcode and inform the guest if it is a valid, unscanned ticket in the system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the ticket is valid in the system but reiterates that they cannot guarantee it hasn't been sold to multiple people.
